name: qui-client
description: Qwik UI CLI (qui): init, connect, add, update — plus default component sources in this repo under components/

scripts.test: node --test test/parser.test.js test/config.test.js test/policy.test.js test/source-resolver.test.js test/component-catalog.test.js test/connect-discovery.test.js test/list.test.js test/add-git-workspace.test.js test/update.test.js test/remove-prune.test.js test/push-resolve.test.js test/diff.test.js test/cli-demo-smoke.test.js test/init-smoke.test.js test/connect-smoke.test.js
scripts.demo:prepare: node ./bin/qui.js init demo && (cd demo && node ../bin/qui.js add --all base --force --auto) && npm run qui:addtest && (cd demo && node ../bin/qui.js generate-demo)
scripts.demo:build: npm run demo:prepare && cd demo && npx qwik add vercel-edge --skipConfirmation true && node ../scripts/patch-demo-vercel-json.mjs && node ../scripts/generate-meta-registry.mjs && npm install && npm run build
scripts.demo:deploy: npm run demo:build && node ./scripts/sync-demo-vercel-output.mjs && npx vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod
scripts.qui:createdemo:
npm run demo:prepare && echo "
Demo created. Run:\ncd demo\nnpm run dev"
scripts.qui:addtest: cd demo && node ../bin/qui.js connect file://../componenttest componenttest --all --force --auto && node ../bin/qui.js add --repo componenttest --all qui-test-simple --force --auto && node ../bin/qui.js add --repo componenttest --all qui-test-layout --force --auto && node ../bin/qui.js add --repo componenttest --all qui-test-complex --force --auto && node ../bin/qui.js add --repo componenttest --all qui-test-html-tags --force --auto
